title: Delicate Crisp Italian Fish Panettone
description: A peppery and crisp Italian dish featuring fish sauce, with an al-dente finish, made in a bamboo steamer and shaped like a panettone, suitable for a sick day, and following ayurvedic rajasic friendly principles.
instructions: Preheat the bamboo steamer by filling the bottom with 2 inches of water and bringing it to a boil.
In a large bowl, whisk together fish sauce, olive oil, garlic, ginger, black pepper, and salt.
Add the cod fish to the bowl and marinate for 10 minutes.
Place the marinated fish in the bamboo steamer and steam for 8 minutes.
While the fish is steaming, mix the chopped parsley and lemon juice in a small bowl.
Once the fish is cooked, remove it from the steamer and top it with the parsley and lemon juice mixture.
Shape the fish into a panettone shape and serve immediately.
Garnish with additional parsley if desired.
Serve with a side of roasted vegetables or a salad for a complete meal.
